stationStatuses.title: Station 1 – Check-In
stationStatuses.description: Verify registration, confirm consent, and assign the participant ID.

stationStatuses.title: Station 2 – Vision Screening
stationStatuses.description: Record vision screening results and route the participant to the next step.

stationStatuses.title: Station 3 – Comprehensive Eye Exam
stationStatuses.description: Provide a full exam and note prescription or referral outcomes.

stationStatuses.title: Station 4 – Frame Selection
stationStatuses.description: Record prescription details and frame selections for ordering.

stationStatuses.title: Station 5 – Vision Success
stationStatuses.description: Confirm next steps, referrals, and follow-up resources before departure.
